activities.name: Wall Push-ups
activities.instructions: Stand arm's length from a wall. Place palms flat on the wall at shoulder height. Bend elbows to bring chest toward wall, then push back.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have wrist or shoulder pain.

activities.name: Chair Squats
activities.instructions: Stand in front of a chair. Lower yourself until you just touch the seat, then stand back up. Keep your weight in your heels.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have knee problems.

activities.name: Calf Raises
activities.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Rise up onto your toes, hold briefly, then lower back down slowly.
activities.contraindications: Hold onto something for balance if needed.

activities.name: Desk Push-ups
activities.instructions: Place hands on the edge of a sturdy desk. Walk feet back until body is at an angle. Lower chest toward desk, then push back up.
activities.contraindications: Ensure desk is stable and won't slide.

activities.name: Standing Leg Lifts
activities.instructions: Stand holding a chair for balance. Lift one leg straight out to the side, hold briefly, lower slowly. Repeat on other side.
activities.contraindications: Keep supporting leg slightly bent.

activities.name: Glute Bridges
activities.instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, feet flat. Lift hips toward ceiling, squeezing glutes at top. Lower slowly.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have lower back issues.

activities.name: Tricep Dips
activities.instructions: Sit on edge of sturdy chair. Place hands beside hips. Slide off and lower body by bending elbows, then push back up.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have shoulder or elbow problems.

activities.name: Lunges
activities.instructions: Step forward with one leg, lowering until both knees are at 90 degrees. Push back to start. Alternate legs.
activities.contraindications: Keep front knee aligned over ankle.

activities.name: Plank Hold
activities.instructions: Get into push-up position on forearms. Keep body in straight line from head to heels. Hold, breathing steadily.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have lower back pain.

activities.name: Wall Sit
activities.instructions: Lean against wall and slide down until thighs are parallel to floor. Hold position, keeping back flat against wall.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have knee problems.

activities.name: Heel Raises
activities.instructions: Stand on one foot holding a wall. Rise up on toes, hold, lower slowly. Switch feet.
activities.contraindications: Use wall for balance support.

activities.name: Sumo Squats
activities.instructions: Stand with feet wide, toes pointing out. Lower into squat keeping chest up, then stand back up.
activities.contraindications: Keep knees tracking over toes.

activities.name: Standing Knee Lifts
activities.instructions: Stand tall. Lift one knee toward chest, lower, then lift the other. Continue alternating at a steady pace.
activities.contraindications: Hold onto wall if balance is challenging.

activities.name: Superman Hold
activities.instructions: Lie face down. Lift arms and legs off floor simultaneously, hold, then lower.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have lower back issues.

activities.name: Standing Side Crunches
activities.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Lift knee to side while bringing elbow down to meet it. Alternate sides.
activities.contraindications: Move slowly and with control.

activities.name: Neck Rolls
activities.instructions: Slowly roll head in a circle, moving ear toward shoulder, chin toward chest, and around. Reverse direction.
activities.contraindications: Move slowly; stop if you feel dizziness.

activities.name: Shoulder Rolls
activities.instructions: Lift shoulders up toward ears, roll them back and down, then forward. Reverse direction.
activities.contraindications: Breathe deeply throughout.

activities.name: Wrist Circles
activities.instructions: Extend arms forward. Make circles with your wrists, rotating hands clockwise then counterclockwise.
activities.contraindications: Move gently if you have carpal tunnel.

activities.name: Ankle Circles
activities.instructions: Lift one foot off floor. Rotate ankle in circles, then switch direction. Repeat with other foot.
activities.contraindications: Sit down if balance is difficult.

activities.name: Hip Circles
activities.instructions: Stand with hands on hips. Make large circles with your hips, as if hula hooping. Reverse direction.
activities.contraindications: Keep movements smooth and controlled.

activities.name: Arm Circles
activities.instructions: Extend arms to sides at shoulder height. Make small circles, gradually increasing size. Reverse.
activities.contraindications: Stop if shoulder pain occurs.

activities.name: Torso Twists
activities.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Rotate upper body left, then right, letting arms swing naturally.
activities.contraindications: Keep hips facing forward.

activities.name: Standing Quad Stretch
activities.instructions: Stand on one leg, holding wall for balance. Grab opposite ankle and pull heel toward glute. Switch sides.
activities.contraindications: Keep knees close together.

activities.name: Calf Stretch
activities.instructions: Face wall, hands on wall. Step one foot back, pressing heel down. Lean forward until you feel stretch in calf.
activities.contraindications: Don't bounce; hold steady.

activities.name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
activities.instructions: Place heel on low surface. Keep leg straight, hinge at hips to lean forward until you feel stretch.
activities.contraindications: Keep back straight; don't round.

activities.name: Chest Opener
activities.instructions: Clasp hands behind back, straighten arms, and lift while squeezing shoulder blades together.
activities.contraindications: Don't force if shoulders are tight.

activities.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
activities.instructions: On hands and knees, alternate between arching back up (cat) and dropping belly down (cow).
activities.contraindications: Move with breath; don't force range.

activities.name: Figure-4 Stretch
activities.instructions: Seated, cross one ankle over opposite knee. Gently press down on raised knee to stretch hip.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have hip issues.

activities.name: Side Neck Stretch
activities.instructions: Tilt ear toward shoulder, using hand to gently increase stretch. Switch sides.
activities.contraindications: Don't pull too hard; be gentle.

activities.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
activities.instructions: Stand in doorway with arms on frame at 90 degrees. Step through gently to stretch chest.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have shoulder problems.

activities.name: Marching in Place
activities.instructions: Stand tall and march in place, lifting knees high. Swing arms naturally opposite to legs.
activities.contraindications: Start slowly if you have balance issues.

activities.name: Jumping Jacks
activities.instructions: Jump feet apart while raising arms overhead. Jump feet together while lowering arms. Repeat rhythmically.
activities.contraindications: Avoid high impact if you have joint issues.

activities.name: Step Touches
activities.instructions: Step to the right, bringing left foot to meet it. Step to the left, bringing right foot to meet it. Repeat.
activities.contraindications: Low impact; suitable for most people.

activities.name: Stair Climbing
activities.instructions: Walk up stairs at a brisk pace. Use handrail if needed. Walk back down carefully.
activities.contraindications: Hold handrail if balance is a concern.

activities.name: High Knees
activities.instructions: Jog in place while lifting knees as high as possible. Pump arms for added intensity.
activities.contraindications: Lower intensity if you feel winded.

activities.name: Butt Kicks
activities.instructions: Jog in place, kicking heels up toward glutes with each step. Keep core engaged.
activities.contraindications: Go at your own pace.

activities.name: Skater Hops
activities.instructions: Hop sideways from one foot to the other, swinging arms across body. Land softly.
activities.contraindications: Reduce hop size if needed for safety.

activities.name: Mountain Climbers
activities.instructions: In plank position, rapidly alternate bringing knees toward chest, like running horizontally.
activities.contraindications: Keep core tight; avoid if wrists hurt.

activities.name: Fast Feet
activities.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Quickly tap feet alternately on floor, staying light on toes.
activities.contraindications: Start slowly to build coordination.

activities.name: Squat Jumps
activities.instructions: Lower into squat, then explosively jump up. Land softly back into squat position.
activities.contraindications: Avoid if you have knee or ankle issues.

activities.name: Power Walking
activities.instructions: Walk briskly around your space or in a hallway. Swing arms and take purposeful steps.
activities.contraindications: Wear supportive shoes.

activities.name: Boxing Punches
activities.instructions: Stand with fists up. Alternate quick punches forward, keeping core engaged. Add footwork if desired.
activities.contraindications: Don't hyperextend elbows.

activities.name: Toe Taps
activities.instructions: Alternate tapping toes on a low step or the floor in front of you at a quick pace.
activities.contraindications: Use a stable surface if using a step.

activities.name: Side Shuffles
activities.instructions: Shuffle sideways a few steps, then shuffle back the other direction. Stay low in athletic stance.
activities.contraindications: Clear space of obstacles first.

activities.name: Jump Rope (Imaginary)
activities.instructions: Pretend to hold a jump rope. Jump lightly while rotating wrists as if spinning a rope.
activities.contraindications: Land softly to protect joints.

activities.name: Shoulder Blade Squeeze
activities.instructions: Sit or stand tall. Squeeze shoulder blades together, hold 3 seconds, release. Keep shoulders down.
activities.contraindications: Don't shrug shoulders up.

activities.name: Chin Tucks
activities.instructions: Sit tall. Draw chin straight back (making a double chin). Hold 3 seconds, release. Keep eyes forward.
activities.contraindications: Don't tilt head down; move chin back.

activities.name: Seated Posture Reset
activities.instructions: Sit tall. Roll shoulders up, back, down. Tuck chin slightly. Hold good posture for 10 seconds.
activities.contraindications: Return to this position throughout day.

activities.name: Wall Angels
activities.instructions: Stand with back against wall. Raise arms to shoulder height, elbows bent. Slide arms up and down like making snow angels.
activities.contraindications: Keep entire back touching wall.

activities.name: Thoracic Extension
activities.instructions: Sit in chair. Place hands behind head. Gently arch upper back over chair back, looking up slightly.
activities.contraindications: Move slowly; don't force range.

activities.name: Upper Back Stretch
activities.instructions: Clasp hands in front, round upper back, push hands away from body. Feel stretch between shoulder blades.
activities.contraindications: Breathe deeply during stretch.

activities.name: Neck Retraction
activities.instructions: Sit tall. Gently pull head back to align ears over shoulders. Hold 5 seconds, release.
activities.contraindications: Don't force; move gently.

activities.name: Standing Tall
activities.instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Imagine a string pulling you up from crown of head. Engage core lightly.
activities.contraindications: Check in with posture regularly.

activities.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
activities.instructions: Kneel on one knee. Shift hips forward until you feel stretch in front of back leg hip. Switch sides.
activities.contraindications: Use cushion under knee if needed.

activities.name: Pec Doorway Stretch
activities.instructions: Stand in doorway with one arm on frame at 90 degrees. Rotate body away to stretch chest. Switch sides.
activities.contraindications: Don't force if shoulder is tight.

activities.name: Seated Spinal Twist
activities.instructions: Sit tall. Place one hand on opposite knee. Gently twist toward that side, looking over shoulder. Switch.
activities.contraindications: Twist from mid-back, not lower back.

activities.name: Prayer Stretch
activities.instructions: Press palms together in front of chest. Lower hands while keeping palms pressed to stretch wrists and forearms.
activities.contraindications: Move slowly if wrists are tight.

activities.name: Levator Stretch
activities.instructions: Tilt head forward and to one side, looking toward armpit. Use hand to gently increase stretch. Switch.
activities.contraindications: Don't pull too forcefully.

activities.name: Trap Stretch
activities.instructions: Sit on one hand. Tilt head toward opposite shoulder. Use other hand to gently assist. Switch sides.
activities.contraindications: Gentle stretch only; don't force.

activities.name: Scapular Push-ups
activities.instructions: In plank position, keep arms straight. Let chest sink between shoulder blades, then push shoulder blades apart.
activities.contraindications: Keep core engaged throughout.
